title: Front Office Manager - Treebo Hotels - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Treebo Hotels - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Front Office Manager with drive and ambition, Treebo Hotels in Varanasi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Treebo Hotels:
Treebo Hotels is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Treebo Hotels!
